# Country Pages Checklist

```md
- [ ] Local-context paragraph present (currency, common karats, market structure, VAT/duty)
- [ ] Not a templated swap of country name across H1 / title / meta
- [ ] Live karat table with freshness label
- [ ] Methodology link in-context
- [ ] Internal links: country index, neighbours, top cities, calculator, related guides
- [ ] Hreflang pair if AR equivalent exists
- [ ] Schema: Place + BreadcrumbList (+ FAQPage if FAQ)
- [ ] Local currency conversion uses USD → local FX (not via AED)
- [ ] If page can't meet the bar: noindex + governance entry
- [ ] AR variant ships in same PR or is tracked in REVAMP_PLAN
- [ ] `npm run audit-pages` does not flag the page as thin / templated
```
